title: Mechelen, Antwerp — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mechelen, Antwerp: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mechelen is a city in Antwerp with a population of 86,000. A centrally located city with a magnificent Gothic cathedral, lively market square, and excellent rail connections to Brussels and Antwerp.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
